name: Smart Router
description: Local-first tiered routing: prefers local ollama models, escalates coding/complex queries to cloud. Saves ~50%+ on typical usage.

defaultTier.description: Default tier for general conversation when no pattern matches

l0Threshold.description: Character threshold for L0 (local worker) classification (overrides criteria.json max_length)

l2Threshold.description: Character threshold for L2_GEN escalation (overrides criteria.json min_length)

customLocalModel.description: Override the LOCAL judge model (default ollama/phi4-mini)

customL0Model.description: Override the L0 local worker model (default ollama/gemma3:4b)

customL1Model.description: Override the L1 conversational model (default openai/gpt-5.4-nano)

customDevModel.description: Override the L2_DEV coding model (default openai/gpt-5.3-codex)

customGenModel.description: Override the L2_GEN reasoning model (default openai/gpt-5.5)

maxExpensivePercentage.description: Max % of requests allowed on the throttled cloud tier (L2_GEN) per hour. >=100 disables the cap. Over-budget requests downgrade to local L0.

expensiveCooldownMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between L2_GEN requests. 0 disables the cooldown.
